title: Gelato
body:
A mod pack that enhances vanilla with basic performance and visual mods, optimised for my vanilla servers - but good for any vanilla servers!

Gelato is a small custom mod pack designed to pair well with the DMPTR Minecraft servers - it has client-side components of AppleSkin and ArmouredElytra and comes bundled with preconfigured controls. It also includes the NoChatReports mod that is required to chat on our servers.
